losesPointsFor: descriptive rather than analytical body paragraphs

selfAssessment.revisionLevel: I do multiple revision passes and usually restructure paragraphs
selfAssessment.evidenceApproach: I build paragraphs around evidence and then explain what the evidence changes
selfAssessment.conclusionApproach: I restate the main claim more sharply after considering the counterargument
selfAssessment.wordCountTendency: I usually land close to the assigned length
writingHabits: I reuse a few transition patterns
